# Bugfixes

- Fixed Stonjourner passive lightspot effect active when Light is inactive
- Fixed Dark Harvest effect duration being too high in some scenarios
- Fixed meta reports not updating on secondary servers
- Fixed range retrieval after locked status is cleared and unit having range bonuses like Long Wand
- Fixed Baneful Bunker poisoning self instead of attacker
- Fixed Hyperspace Fury, Ceasless Edge and Surging Strike not being able to crit by default
- Fixed some board effects not cleaning properly after a tidal wave
- Fixed a bug with Unown reminiscence effect not being cleared properly when shop is locked
- Fixed Focus punch sometimes not applying its damage against heavy duty boots and shiny charm
- Fixed Avalugg Bergmite troopers not appearing in shop and not being added to Mountain Gale damagfe
